input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.2.2
            TITLE: vertical walls, covers and lids must be made from one of the three:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.2.2: Vertical Walls, Covers and Lids must be made from one of the three:
F.10.2.2 Vertical Walls, Covers and Lids must be made from one of the three: 
a. Steel   0.9 mm minimum thickness  
b. Aluminum  2.3 mm minimum thickness 
c. Equivalent Alternate / Composite materials ( F.4.1,  F.4.3 )

final_answer: Vertical Walls, Covers and Lids must be made from one of the three: a. Steel 0.9 mm minimum thickness b. Aluminum 2.3 mm minimum thickness c. Equivalent Alternate / Composite materials ( F.4.1, F.4.3 )
